hooks.name: Track New Artifacts
hooks.description: When a new source or config file is created, ensure it gets documented so nothing built goes untracked.

action.prompt: A new file was created. Decide if it represents a new tracked artifact (a new package, app, spec, module, or experiment folder) versus a routine file within already-tracked work. If it is a new artifact worth recording: ensure its containing folder has a short README describing its purpose and status, and add a one-line note to .kiro/PROJECT_STATE.md under the appropriate section. If it is routine (e.g. a file inside a package already noted as in-progress), do nothing. Do NOT create noise for every file — only track genuinely new units of work. Ignore files under node_modules/, dist/, build/, tooling/, and archive/.
